name: default pipeline
description: Behavior-identical mirror of today's hardcoded pipeline (apps/engine/src/api/http.ts): on the queue drain, transcribe? -> distill -> the moments/index extras; the follow-up-draft act rides session.ended, not the drain. Each step's when.flag is the flag that gates that behavior today; P4A slice 2 seeds THIS document as the default and coalesces the drain distill-family steps into one distiller call.
